segments.text: Push them off and secure the line!
segments.original_text: 外に追い出してラインを確保して

segments.text: Wants to pressure from here, but...
segments.original_text: このラインで押し上げたいが
コリンクの上スマッシュ

segments.text: Catches the attack he was trying to set up!
segments.original_text: 置きたかった安定の下りの攻撃に対して

full_text: Push them off and secure the line! Wants to pressure from here, but... Corrin's up smash! Catches the attack he was trying to set up!
